notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Gabriel Moreno out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Chapman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.

notableEvents.label: Heliot Ramos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Heliot Ramos grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Pavin Smith. Rafael Devers out at 2nd. Heliot Ramos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee grounds out softly to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Drew Cavanaugh pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Cavanaugh singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Bryce Eldridge scores.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert pops out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas in foul territory.
